title: StoneBloom Events
description: The Official Modpack for StoneBloom Events! Download and click connect to StoneBloom!
body:
# StoneBloom Events Modpack

The StoneBloom Events Modpack is the official pack used to participate in StoneBloom Events.
Forked from of [Fabulously Optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/fabulously-optimized), it provides the smooth performance and quality-of-life features you’d expect, while adding a few key enhancements to make events more immersive.While this pack is not endorsed by Fabulously Optimized, it **IS** rather forked from their amazing hard work

## Features

**Performance-Optimized**: Enjoy the stability and optimizations of Fabulously Optimized.

**Flashback**: Capture and replay moments to relive event highlights.

**Simple Voice Chat**: Talk directly with other players for seamless teamwork and coordination.

**Pre-Configured Shaderpack**: Experience beautiful visuals out of the box, with optimized settings for performance and style.

## Purpose

This modpack is optional for all StoneBloom Events to ensure consistency, performance, and an immersive player experience.
